programme.desc: This season is all about playful problem solving, with the recurring use of the mantra "I wonder, what if, let's try!".

programme.title: Ping And Friends
programme.desc: Ping is a songbird and each episode she joins with her friends to create a new song, inspired by some occurrence or problem in their everyday lives. If life's a song, they're going to sing it!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: Captain Redbeard's special friend is missing, and he needs the children's help to find it. Mr Garden Gnome has lost his magic! The children think of different ways to help him get it back, but the solution may not be as challenging as they think.

programme.title: Mush-Mush and The Mushables Part 1
programme.desc: Every time Mush-Mush has tried to surprise his friend with a gift, Chep has always found out what it was. But Chep promises that this time he won't. And Lilit, who is too honest to keep a secret, promises she won't let Chep know what the surprise is. Both of them find this so hard! But Mush-Mush is one step ahead of them...

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Diyana comes into the parlour excited about something she just heard on the radio about a competition. A 'kid life coach guru' - Rayen walks into the parlour for ice cream while his minions give away a flyer stating that they are giving away free passes to the RoboRobo big theme park carnival that is successful in breaking a bad habit. The competition is on but not everyone is being honest. They also discover a secret about Rayen.

Things are going well for Vanessa at work until she learns that Dr Safinah is going to take her off medication for good.

programme.desc: (R) Fashion designer Zhou Fang and a boss of an e-commerce company Song Li meet because of a commercial lawsuit, but they are forced to cooperate because of the ties between life and work. programme.title: The Way To Happiness
programme.desc: The Gao brothers, because of their completely different values, not only judge their achievements, but also educate their children with very different personalities and characters. The previous generation has information on the grievances and grievances of the previous generation, and the next generation has the pursuit and prospect of the next generation; on the intricate road ahead, everyone is diligently searching for their own happiness.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: (R) Yixin wants Boyang to forget their one-night stand. Accused of trading sexual favours with models, Boyang suspects Zizi frames him. Zizi thinks the two are in cahoots as Yixin reveals she is Boyang's ex-wife. Yixin feels bad that Zizi slept with Boyang due to her words. Yunen grows closer to Clinton and agrees to help Feifei. Youde tells why he abandoned Zhengguo. Zhengguo brings him home.

programme.title: Hello Singapore
programme.desc: (Live) Delivering the day's latest news and social features that matter to you. Every Monday to Friday, from 6.30pm to 7.30pm on Channel 8.

programme.title: My One And Only
programme.desc: Xiumei confronts May after the police raids her brothel. Zhongyi gets hurt while saving May. Zhongyi is stuck between Huiling and May when they fight over him. Defu discovers that Prof Lai may have violated housing regulations and threatens to expose him unless he stops singling Defu out. Limin couldn't get to the toilet in time due to mobility issues and is embarrassed when she dirties her pants.

programme.title: Inside Crime Scene 2
programme.sub-title: The Root of All Evil(English/Chinese Subtitles)
programme.desc: It has been said that money is the root of all evil. Swindlers thrive on, and take advantage of, the inflated egos of their victims. Scammers are quick to prey on man's greed for more money, which is why sleights of hand and ponzi schemes succeed. What if the conman is in a profession our society holds in high esteem - a lawyer, for example?

programme.title: Stranger In The Dark
programme.desc: Shang Xue celebrates her birthday with her friends. She worries that Yuze is in danger when her neighbour Ms Liu goes missing. She finds a photo of a keychain with "ford" on it on social media and thinks of "Sherrinford" from the mystery forum. Shang Xue and Junzhe attend the press conference for The Missing Body: Part 2. Unbeknownst to them, someone is watching them.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Focus provides timely reports and analyses on international news and current affairs from Singapore's perspective.

programme.title: New Life Begins
programme.desc: Young ladies gather in the kingdom of Xin Chuan because of the royal marriage selection. Li Wei, who just wants to work hard and not get selected, finds herself involved with Yin Zheng, the sixth young master of Xin Chuan. They accidentally get together and start a new life with many different situations.

programme.title: The Long Ballad
programme.desc: (R) There are rumors going around town about a fire which may take place in Luoyang. Changge almost ran into Du Ruhui who is seeking treatment at the abbey and escapes when Master Jing Dan appears to save her. The rumor comes true and a big fire takes place at Ziwei Palace.

programme.title: What's In The Fridge?
programme.desc: (R) An unprecedented culinary competition where the three hosts are put to an intense blind test to choose their partners. With the clock ticking, each team are required to utilize the ingredients they can find in the respective fridges and whip up a dish according to the week's theme. Which team will overcome all odds and impress the judges to be crowned as the culinary king of the week?

programme.title: Meat And Greed 2
programme.desc: (R) We dive deep for some of the tastiest and freshest seafood around! programme.title: Gracious Revenge
programme.desc: (R)(Dual Language - Mandarin and Korean) After knowing that Youzhen has regained consciousness, Meiyan plans to leave Korea. She decides to give all her J Group shares and the management rights to Haijun and Youzhen and hopes that Haijun could stay by Youzhen's side.

programme.title: Red Shoes
programme.desc: (Dual Language - Mandarin and Korean) Zhenma hires private detective, Pu Zhenxie, to find the car which Hexiang abandoned after the hit-and-run accident. programme.title: Us Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, "Squawk On The Street" tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time. The show also covers the final hour of European trading, providing investors with actionable insight on the best course of action to take in U.S. based markets.

programme.title: Us Power Lunch

programme.title: Us Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving individual stocks and how investors are reacting. CEOs, analysts and money managers explain their strategies, share opinions, and provide an inside perspective on breaking news stories.

programme.title: Us Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.desc: Bringing out potential and capability of children aged 0 to 2 years by stimulating their feelings with pictures and sound.

programme.title: Night Drama Serial "The Great Pretender Miwa" Eps. 27
programme.desc: Kubota Miwa（Matsumoto Honoka）is a movie buff just got fired from her part-time job at a DVD rental store. One day, she is mistakenly believed to be the new housekeeper of her favorite actor, Yatsumi Takashi（Tsutsumi Shinichi）, by an unlikely coincidence. Without being able to reveal her true identity, she begins working, pretending to be an outstanding housekeeper.

programme.title: Warawanai Sugaku--a Comedian Explains Advanced Math with No Laughs
programme.desc: This is a unique intellectual entertainment program in which Ogata Takahiro, a member of the comedy trio Panther, earnestly explains the advanced mathematics world. It delves deeply into many complex math problems, such as "Riemann Hypothesis" and "Fermat's Last Theorem", which have tortured even genius mathematicians, in an easy-to-understand manner, with no laughs.

programme.title: Luxe Asia
programme.desc: In the new season, Asia's most exclusive series returns to showcase the finest experiences and most luxurious living trends in the region. From the Waldorf Hotel in Shanghai, to Singapore's multi-billion dollar luxury goods market including custom made suits, cars and jets, Luxe Asia provides exclusive insight into Asia's high life. Featuring intimate access into invitation only events and VIP hangouts, this is the most exquisite series yet.

programme.title: Off The Map
programme.desc: Off the Map challenges our preconceived notions about certain countries whose conflicts and tensions constantly make headlines. After visiting the most dangerous cities in the world, Hugo Girard tackles destinations that harbor beautiful tourist attractions but few people dare to visit. A brave and resourceful traveler, Hugo crosses borders and boundaries in order to discover unseen people and places whose beauty will astound you.

programme.title: Mission Restorable
programme.desc: Open the tool box - Bong has a plan! Bong is a top graphic designer. He loves to give hidden treasures a new lease of life. Restoring neglected family heirlooms and upcycling discarded junk, he transforms the ordinary into the extraordinary. From antique furniture to scrapyard junk, there is nothing Bong won't tackle on MISSION RESTORABLE!

programme.title: Brilliant Corners
programme.desc: Presented by surfer, writer, geographer and former European Longboard Champion Sam Bleakley, Brilliant Corners is a trailblazing surf travel series exploring emerging surf cultures, cultural tourism frontiers, and capturing the power of surfing for social good.

programme.title: Destination Happiness
programme.desc: Follow our roadmap to joy as we uncover insightful, uplifting and inspiring ideas for the mind, body and soul. Give your life an over-haul from the inside out.

programme.title: Exploring Nusantara With Kristian Hansen
programme.desc: Showcasing spectacular journey like you've never seen it before! Join with Kristian Hansen on non-stop journey one of Asia's most exotic and breath-taking nations Indonesia. Crossingmotorcycle journey from Sabang to Merauke to show you historic, cultural, people and insights alongside tantalising food and drinks, this show will inspire you and learn more about Indonesia.

programme.title: Meet The Creators
programme.desc: Meet the Creators will take you to see the journey of local works and businesses in Indonesia.

programme.title: The New Zealanders
programme.desc: The New Zealanders is a beautifully shot series introducing us to some of the quirkiest locations and heart-warming characters throughout New Zealand.

programme.title: Tough Trucks
programme.desc: Tough Trains takes viewers on some of the most epic and hard-core train journeys on the planet. Trips that should take hours often take days, and nights that should be spent in towns are spent aboard tough trains.

programme.title: Discover London
programme.desc: Discover London uncovers hidden gems, guided by an experienced London Black Taxi driver and respected 'Knowledge of London' tutor, and a youthful Londoner seeking to learn more about her city. With almost every London street having a story behind it, there are surprising revelations along the way.

programme.title: Rudy Maxa's World
programme.desc: Welcome to Rudy Maxa's World, the ultimate travel experience with America's leading high-end travel expert. Join Rudy Maxa, public radio's original Savvy Traveler and contributing editor for National Geographic Traveler magazine.

programme.title: Stories Of Taste
programme.desc: Stories of Taste will provide a new perspective about the taste of unique cuisines across the cities in Indonesia. Take an in-depth look at the struggles and history of the owners in building and creating great food or restaurants.

programme.title: The Land Of Spices
programme.desc: Indonesia is famous for its rich spices. This program provides an in-depth insight into each spice, its benefits for life and health. All information is conveyed in a modern yet humorous way.

programme.title: 3-Hour News Show (Live)
programme.desc: 3 Hour News Show is one of our flagship programs which airs daily 4 - 7 PM, this program have a CEO Talk segment where the guest star is the CEO of various reputable companies.

programme.title: Ngoceh
programme.desc: This talk show presented Kiky Saputri and Marshel Widianto, who were previously well-known in the stand-up comedy world. This hilarious duo will comment on various things, from videos, pictures, to social media shots in a funny and entertaining style.

programme.title: Ngonten
programme.desc: This talk show presented Kiky Saputri and Marshel Widianto, who were previously well-known in the stand-up comedy world. This hilarious duo will comment on various things, from videos, pictures, to social media shots in a funny and entertaining style.

programme.title: Sportlite
programme.desc: Find the history and unique story in every sport branches with Sportlite.

programme.title: Earth On Edge
programme.desc: Documentary series about the climate crisis. We travel to Iceland, Greenland, Denmark, Japan and California to explore the effects of a warming planet. While the situation is dire, there is hope. Brilliant minds are coming up with solutions that could show us a new way. As we stand on the edge, what is our next step?

programme.title: Night Guard
programme.desc: A family run business, Night Guard is a private security firm operating in Johannesburg, South Africa, where a violent crime happens every 16 seconds. Night Guard serves the people of Johannesburg by taking on the jobs that the police can't.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17
programme.desc: A two-part dramatic retelling of the Apollo 17 mission, the last to land men on the moon. With stunning NASA footage and mission audio to guide you, experience Space first-hand.

programme.title: Lady Killers
programme.desc: British crime writer, Martina Cole, examines the life and times of the most notorious female serial killers across history and asks: why do women kill and why are we surprised when they do?

programme.title: Countdown To Qatar
programme.desc: 100 of the greatest moments in FIFA World Cup history as we count down to the start of the global showpiece in Qatar on 20 November.

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days Without Money
programme.desc: Two friends, Milan and Muammer, have decided to recreate Jules Verne's fictional journey without spending a single penny of their own, and thus depending completely on human kindness to eat, sleep and even travel! By doing so, they want to prove that good people can be found in every corner of the globe.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: The Red Sea, the Indian Ocean, Indonesia's coral reefs, the Maldivian archipelago, or the islands of Azores - these are all home to some of the rarest and most beautiful sea life on the planet. Peering through crystal waters, this series reveals the world's most incredible diving spots and transports you to an exquisite underwater paradise.

programme.title: Rivers To The Sea
programme.desc: The Mekong, the Mississippi, the Danube, the Amazon... on every continent, there are mythical rivers, veritable invitations to head for the open sea. They are the source of the greatest civilizations, a refuge for forgotten people, an economic and cultural lung, and fantastic ecosystems.

programme.title: Duo Backpackers
programme.desc: The journey of two travelers to magnificent hidden places across the islands of Indonesia.

programme.title: Miss Adventure
programme.desc: Journey with our intrepid hosts Munah Bagharib and Carla Dunareaunu as they explore the Asia-Pacific region, pushing themselves both physically and mentally for an adventure in the most amazing of locations. From tracking down the Komodo dragon on the island of Komodo to tandem sky diving in New Zealand, they will face their greatest fears and excitement in order to complete every single task at each location.

programme.title: Understanding Asia
programme.desc: Understanding Asia is a seven-part series that delves deep into China, India, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Japan and Hong Kong. Each episode uses an allusive approach that begins with a hypothesis about the subject. We talk to different social scientists and experts around the world to test our hypothesis and in the process, whether by confirmation or refutation, we deep-dive into the psyche and DNA of each subject matter.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.desc: Take a tour of Africa's most spectacular safari lodges in this beautifully shot 4K travel series. From sunrise wildlife encounters at the watering hole to sunset cocktails by the pool, get a taste of the luxury living on offer at these extraordinary retreats.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Dr Scott Miller is warm, caring, charismatic and committed to his patients. Set in the outskirts of London in the quiet village of Richmond upon Thames, Dr Scott's veterinary clinic is anything but. The hustle and bustle of friendly regulars keeps him on his toes, while his home visits are always rewarding and full of surprises.

programme.title: Animalpedia
programme.desc: A program for animal lovers. Everything you need to know about each animal that will be featured in this program.

programme.title: The Animal Library
programme.desc: A program about animals. Not only about pets, but also discuss about the types of care, and also the costs incurred as well as the uniqueness.

programme.title: K9 Mounties
programme.desc: When the Royal Canadian Mountain Police Force are in search of a missing person they call in the help of an elite group. The K9 Mounties are rigorously trained to be able to locate those in need in the hardest to reach places. Watch as some of Canada's finest police officers are pushed to the limit in a gruelling 17 week training programme at the PCMP's Police Dog Service Training Centre in Canada.

programme.title: Lady Killers
programme.desc: British crime writer, Martina Cole, examines the life and times of the most notorious female serial killers across history and asks: why do women kill and why are we surprised when they do?

programme.title: Countdown To Qatar
programme.desc: 100 of the greatest moments in FIFA World Cup history as we count down to the start of the global showpiece in Qatar on 20 November.

programme.title: Feeding A City
programme.desc: When a global pandemic hits a culinary paradise, one small island must confront a serious issue. How will Singapore grow and sustain its food supply into the future? FEEDING A CITY looks at how a diverse group of food warriors - scientists; farmers; entrepreneurs and policymakers - are coming together to find solutions to expand Singapore's fight for food resilience.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: The Red Sea, the Indian Ocean, Indonesia's coral reefs, the Maldivian archipelago, or the islands of Azores - these are all home to some of the rarest and most beautiful sea life on the planet. Peering through crystal waters, this series reveals the world's most incredible diving spots and transports you to an exquisite underwater paradise._x000D_

programme.title: Eat Around Indonesia
programme.desc: Spices have always been fulfilling most of our land and are the primary charm that makes people came here in droves from hundreds years ago. Within the varioustaste given by nature, Indonesia grows with many kinds of delicacies. Accompany each lives with pleasure and joy every single day. Eat Around Indonesia takes people to taste delicious foods around Indonesia. Indonesian famous culinary will be known even wider.

programme.title: Duo Backpackers
programme.desc: The journey of two travelers to magnificent hidden places across the islands of Indonesia.

programme.title: Destination Happiness
programme.desc: Follow our roadmap to joy as we uncover insightful, uplifting and inspiring ideas for the mind, body and soul. Give your life an over-haul from the inside out.

programme.title: Mission Restorable
programme.desc: Open the tool box - Bong has a plan! Bong is a top graphic designer. He loves to give hidden treasures a new lease of life. Restoring neglected family heirlooms and upcycling discarded junk, he transforms the ordinary into the extraordinary. From antique furniture to scrapyard junk, there is nothing Bong won't tackle on MISSION RESTORABLE!

programme.title: On Safari
programme.desc: Take a tour of Africa's most spectacular safari lodges in this beautifully shot 4K travel series. From sunrise wildlife encounters at the watering hole to sunset cocktails by the pool, get a taste of the luxury living on offer at these extraordinary retreats.

programme.title: Vet On The Hill
programme.desc: Dr Scott Miller is warm, caring, charismatic and committed to his patients. Set in the outskirts of London in the quiet village of Richmond upon Thames, Dr Scott's veterinary clinic is anything but. The hustle and bustle of friendly regulars keeps him on his toes, while his home visits are always rewarding and full of surprises. A philanthropist and passionate animal advocate, Dr Scott grew up and studied in Brisbane, Australia, before his career at the RSPCA in Sydney.

programme.title: Animalpedia
programme.desc: A program for animal lovers. Everything you need to know about each animal that will be featured in this program.

programme.title: The Animal Library
programme.desc: A program about animals. Not only about pets, but also discuss about the types of care, and also the costs incurred as well as the uniqueness.

programme.title: Tabula Rasa
programme.desc: A religious program that preached by Abu Marlo. He is a former magician that currently become an Indonesian motivator.

programme.title: Sea Morning Show (Live)
programme.desc: SEA Morning Show delivers up to-date news, live reports, talk shows and features about Indonesia and also Southeast Asia which airs daily 6 - 9 am.

programme.title: Kaun Banega Crorepati - 2023
programme.desc: Amitabh Bachchan returns as the megastar host of the worlds' iconic quiz show and gives contestants the chance to take the "Hot Seat" and win a life changing 70 million Rupees.

programme.title: Barsatein - Mausam Pyaar ka
programme.desc: Aaradhana and Reyansh find themselves collaborating at Reyansh's news channel. Despite their differences the chemistry between them ignites a love affair only to meet a devastating conclusion

programme.title: Saajan Chale Sasural
programme.desc: After Shyamsunder presumes that his first wife Pooja died in a flood, he marries Divya. When he learns that Pooja is alive, he has to juggle between his wives, keeping both his marriages a secret.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Ajay, a young doctor, falls in love with and marries his colleague, Dr Swetha. When she uncovers an organ trafficking racket in their hospital, she is killed before she can expose it.

programme.title: Amar Prem
programme.desc: Pushpa is thrown out of her home after her husband remarries and removes her. The disheartened Pushpa goes home, only to be disowned by her mother and sold to a brothel in Kolkata by her uncle.

programme.title: 3 Idiots
programme.desc: Two friends search for their long lost college friend and genius "Rancho" played by Aamir Khan with hilarious consequences. Award winning movie from director Rajkumar Hirani. (2009)

programme.title: Phantom
programme.desc: Action thriller starring Saif Ali Khan as a disgraced soldier carrying out an assassination in order to to restore his honour. Based on the book Mumbai Avengers: Aftermath of the 26/11 Attacks. (2015)

programme.title: Gumraah
programme.desc: The murder investigation into a young man's death takes an unexpected turn when the cops discover that the prime suspect has a lookalike.

programme.title: Dybbuk
programme.desc: When a newly married woman brings an antique Jewish box into her home, she and her husband start experiencing paranormal events.

programme.title: Heyy Babyy
programme.desc: Three compulsive womanisers find a baby left at their doorstep. However, chaos ensues as they try to contact their ex-lovers to determine who the father could be.

programme.title: Seeru
programme.desc: A turn of events makes Manimaran protect Malli, the henchman who was hired to kill him. In the process of saving Malli, Manimaran ends up locking horns with Ashok Mithran, a corrupt lawyer.

programme.title: Srivalli
programme.desc: Srivalli, the daughter of a scientist, relocates to India with her father and brother. However, her life turns upside down after she volunteers for a dangerous scientific experiment.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez Kgf: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Rocky takes control of the Kolar Gold Fields and his newfound power makes the government as well as his enemies jittery. However, he still has to confront Ramika, Adheera and Inayat

programme.title: Hichki
programme.desc: After numerous rejections, a woman who has Tourette's syndrome lands a job as a teacher at an elite school. She tries to do whatever she can to make her troublemaking students realize their potential.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Ludo
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Bewakoofiyaan
programme.desc: Mohit a marketing whiz kid and Mayera, the financial brain with a penchant for shoes, are a couple in love but lacking money. Can you survive on just love and fresh air? (2014)

programme.title: Isi Ka Naam Zindagi
programme.desc: A plot of land is donated to an old man by a kind-hearted landlord who then passes away. The landlord's lecherous and alcoholic son falls into bad company and wants to acquire this land at any cost.

programme.title: Amanush
programme.desc: A village youth falsely implicated in a conspiracy is imprisoned and can't prove his innocence to his beloved. Devastated, he takes to alcohol.

programme.title: Patel Ki Punjabi Shaadi
programme.desc: Hasmukh Patel, a Gujarati man, finds himself at odds with his new neighbour, Guggi Tandon. To add to his woes, their children fall in love with each other.

programme.title: Mumbai Saga
programme.desc: After his brother is almost killed by goons, Amartya Rao enters the underworld and becomes an influential don. However, he must also deal with other gangsters and a bloodthirsty policeman.

programme.title: Ishaqzaade
programme.desc: A story of two people who were born to hate, but destined to love.

programme.title: Toolsidas Junior
programme.desc: Watching his father lose the 1994 Club Snooker Championship, 13-year-old Midi takes on the impossible journey to bring his father's name on the Winner's Board.

programme.title: Bahubali: The Beginning
programme.desc: A dispute between brothers spans across two generations in this two-part period drama. Brothers Baahubali and Bhallaladeva fight for the throne to Mahishmathi Kingdom.

programme.title: Tholu Bommalata
programme.desc: Sodala Raju promises his grandchildren, Rushi and Varsha, to seek approval of their parents for their marriage. However, upon his unfortunate death, his spirit sets out to resolve the familial strife

programme.title: The Making: Pk
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Karwaan
programme.desc: Two friends and a chirpy teenager take a road trip from Bangalore to Kochi.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise
programme.desc: (Dual Language - English and Malay) Legendary Blader Valt Aoi has been training the next generation of elite Bladers at Spain's BC Sol. One day, rookie Bladers Dante Koryu and Delta Zakuro witness Valt unleashing his newly evolved Gamma Bey, Sword Valtryek. To their surprise, Valtryek radiates a golden light as it rockets around the stadium. Inspired by the limitless possibilities of this "Hyper-Flux" state, both Dante and Delta seek the same bond with their Beys.

programme.title: Janji Sedap
programme.desc: Join our chef as he takes you to a culinary journey and learn how to whip up vibrant and flavoursome cuisine.

programme.desc: Let our hosts introduce you to a range of practical and valuable home products making your lifemore convenient than ever.Buy now at www.jml.sg or call JML hotline 63868686 from Mon-Fri, 10am-11am.

programme.title: Do You Love Me Captain?
programme.desc: Daneena begs Darish to let her stay at his house temporarily. Darish feels that there is something familiar about Daneena.

programme.title: Setelah Terlafaznya Akad 2
programme.desc: Ida finally shows her true colours to Nawal when Nawal confronts her after overhearing Ida's conversation with Masitah.

programme.title: Kelab J
programme.desc: The successful Halimah suspects her husband is cheating on her. She follows him and finds him with his mistress. A dramatic confrontation ensues and one member of the public takes a video of the fight. Overnight, her life comes crushing down which further strain her relationship with her daughter.

programme.title: Putri Mahkota
programme.desc: The discovery of the two deceased fishermen in the sea has sent shockwaves through the village, leaving the community grieving and seeking answers. The villagers firmly believe that Mr. Hanif, a figure of influence or authority within the community, should bear responsibility for the incident and provide compensation to the affected families.

programme.title: Berani Nyanyi
programme.desc: Expect more surprises as 6 mysterious personalities try to show off their vocal skills. Will the judges be shocked by their own choices? Who are the last 6 contestants who are brave enough to take up the challenge in this season? Look out for who this week's chief judge Gurmit Singh and his panel will choose to join the semifinals squad.

programme.title: Do You Love Me Captain?
programme.desc: Daneena begs Darish to let her stay at his house temporarily. Darish feels that there is something familiar about Daneena.

programme.title: Kahwin Satu Keluarga
programme.desc: The man Janna has been hunting all these while suddenly appears with promises to make amends. Everyone is taken in by Hambali, except Zainah. Adina is taken aback when Putri demands she stays away from her dad, Arrie. Husna sees Syukri enjoying himself, having lunch with a mysterious lady.
